entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop being studied for disease resistance

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease affecting pearl millet caused by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: GENETIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of pearl millet accessions to resist downy mildew infection

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD SENSITIVITY
entities.description: The response of pearl millet accessions to day length, affecting their flowering and growth

entities.name: ICML 22
entities.description: A photoperiod-insensitive line used to convert photoperiod-sensitive material into a day-neutral background

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A location in Andhra Pradesh, India, where greenhouse and field screenings were conducted

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where Patancheru is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: MYSORE
entities.description: A location associated with a specific pathotype of downy mildew

entities.name: GREENHOUSE SCREENING
entities.description: A method of testing plant resistance to downy mildew under controlled greenhouse conditions

entities.name: FIELD DISEASE NURSERIES
entities.description: A method of testing plant resistance to downy mildew in field environments

entities.name: INOCULATION METHODS
entities.description: Severe techniques including inject, drop, and dip used to test for potential resistance

entities.name: PATANCHERU PATHOTYPE
entities.description: A specific strain of Sclerospora graminicola found in Patancheru

entities.name: MYSORE PATHOTYPE
entities.description: A specific strain of Sclerospora graminicola found in Mysore
